Headline: Closure - Logiealmond Primary School (State), Perthshire
Info: Perth and Kinross Council will consider an options appraisal later this week that includes the possible permanent closure of Logiealmond Primary School due to a significant decline in local pupil numbers.

Headline: Closure Update - St Joseph's College, Reading
Info: Following the announcement of the independent school's potential closure on 10 July, local MPs have issued official responses. They are actively working with borough councils to support families and secure alternative educational placements for affected pupils.

Headline: Closure - St Gerard's School, Bangor
Info: St Gerard's School has announced it will permanently close at the end of the current academic year due to sustained financial pressures. The independent school cited the introduction of VAT on fees, the loss of charitable status, and falling pupil numbers as reasons it is no longer viable.

Headline: Closure - St Michael Abbey School, Tenbury Wells
Info: Less than a year after opening, independent St Michael Abbey School has confirmed it will cease operating as a day and boarding school at the end of the summer term. The school is currently supporting its students and staff to secure new placements and employment.
